geopolitical.name: US-China Trade War
geopolitical.details: Trump tariffs near century-high levels. China retaliating with trade probes.
geopolitical.mitigation: Reduce China-dependent exposure, prefer diversified supply chain companies

geopolitical.name: Taiwan Strait
geopolitical.details: Large-scale Chinese military flights resumed near Taiwan March 15, 2026
geopolitical.mitigation: Limit Korea market weight to 30%, diversify geographically

geopolitical.name: Middle East (Hormuz Strait)
geopolitical.details: IEA warns of largest-ever oil supply disruption: 8M bpd if Hormuz blocked

geopolitical.name: Russia-Ukraine War
geopolitical.details: Ongoing intense fighting, Ukraine drone strikes on Russian ports
geopolitical.mitigation: Monitor European exposure, energy import diversification

geopolitical.name: North Korea Nuclear
geopolitical.details: Kim Jong Un vows 'irreversibly' to cement nuclear status, threatens South Korea
geopolitical.mitigation: Geographic diversification, safe-asset floor for Korea exposure

economic.name: US Recession
economic.details: Moody's Zandi: 49%, Goldman: 30%, WSJ survey: 30-35%. Historical baseline: 15-20%
economic.mitigation: Safe asset floor 15-20%, defensive sector allocation

economic.name: Inflation Re-acceleration
economic.details: Core PCE at 3.1%, war-driven energy shock risk. Fed 'Higher for Longer' reinforced

economic.name: Commercial Real Estate
economic.details: $100B+ CMBS loans maturing 2026, office delinquency above 12%
economic.mitigation: Limit REIT exposure, avoid regional bank stocks

economic.name: China Deflation/Slowdown
economic.details: Record deflation in China, dangerous mix with oil shock could flip to bad inflation
economic.mitigation: Reduce China-dependent Korean export stock weight

market.name: AI Bubble
market.details: One AI bubble already burst, another 'rare' kind still growing. $200B VC + $150B Big Tech in AI
market.mitigation: Limit individual tech stock to 5%, mix value/defensive stocks

market.name: Magnificent 7 Concentration
market.details: $850B+ wiped in recent sell-off. Rob Arnott: 'exit Mag 7'
market.mitigation: Prefer equal-weight ETFs over cap-weighted, limit Mag 7 to 10%

market.name: Bond Market Volatility
market.details: MOVE index 95 (9-month high), 10Y Treasury 4.28-4.40%, 64% volatility surge in 6 weeks

market.name: KRW Depreciation
market.details: Won at 15-year low (~1,507), heading toward 1,550. Weakest since March 2009

assumptions: Fed unable to cut due to inflation
